description:
Thank you for visiting our store!
❤️‍🔥DESCRIPTION
• Crafted from high-quality stainless steel
• Double wall insulation: keeps drinks hot or cold
• 20 oz fluid capacity
• Includes (1) tumbler, BPA-free clear lid, and straw
• For best results, hand wash with soap, water, and a non-scratch sponge
• Size: 20 oz: 7 cm x 8.5 cm x 17.5 cm

❤️‍🔥 HOW TO ORDER:
1. Browse all listing photos to view product details.
2. Choose your preferred size and color from the dropdown menus.
3. Select the quantity you'd like to purchase.

❤️‍🔥PLEASE NOTE:
• The color may slightly vary from the image.
Please note that this is a 2D flat 20oz tumbler
